title: RDPlanks
description:
Texture Pack that replaces Oak Plank and Birch Plank textures with the 1st ever plank texture and 2nd ever plank texture from Pre-Classic.

(JE pre-Classic rd-160052, JE pre-Classic rd-161348 respectively.)
body:
![RDPlanks logo made out of the changed planks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f59de8c8f4eaca497bba9da5dd2ba6f0fe857c29.png)

This Resource Pack changes the Oak Plank Texture to the one used in rd-160052, and the Birch Plank Texture to the one in rd-161348. It does not modify doors, bookshelves, trapdoors, campfires, torches etc. Only changes the plank textures which may change other blocks that use the plank texture. 

This is kind of niche, but I thought the planks looked nice, and I'm looking forward to seeing other people using this pack.


Fun Fact: RD stands for RubyDung!
